title: Pet Care Checklist Template
agent_task_phrase: A person searching pet care checklist template needs a useful answer without signup.
human_task_phrase: Build a practical pet care handoff checklist to save time during travel or sitter transitions.
install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/pet-care-checklist-template/, fill the form, and generate your checklist. Copy or download the result.
proof_evidence: GA events for completion, save/export, and paid CTA click
adoption_metric: qualified completions, save/export clicks, paid CTA clicks
first_action: Fill the form and press Generate checklist.
smoke_test: Generate, check one checkbox, and copy the output successfully.

examples.label: 3-day sitter handoff
examples.description: Food, water, medication, and care notes grouped into day buckets for a sitter.

examples.label: overnight travel checklist
examples.description: Emergency contacts and security checks included before leaving home.

paid_offer.title: $9 pet care handoff checklist
paid_offer.positioning: Optional cleanup/export pack if the user wants a branded handoff deliverable.

trust_notes: Use source links before assumptions in output planning.
No account or sign-up is required to use the core flow.
